defaults.hook_text: 38 YEARS OLD. HIS FIRST EVER WORLD CUP HAT-TRICK

videos.video_subject: Messi's first ever World Cup hat-trick at 38 (2026 World Cup vs Algeria)
videos.video_script: Lionel Messi has played in SIX World Cups. Twenty-two years on the biggest stage in football. And today, at 38 years old, he finally did the one thing he had NEVER done. A World Cup hat-trick. Three goals against Algeria. With those goals, Messi tied Miroslav Klose's all-time record of sixteen World Cup goals, and became the first player in history to appear in six World Cups. Let that sink in. The greatest is still re-writing the record books at thirty-eight.
